'''竏喘-ch-y-k''' ('''kabachyekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ticktock|ticktock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ticktock|ticktock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-ch-y-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabachyekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachyekoko|thibachyekoko]] || [[word:jibachyekoko|jibachyekoko]] || [[word:shibachyekoko|shibachyekoko]] || [[word:kibachyekoko|kibachyekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachyekoko|thuthubachyekoko]] || [[word:jujubachyekoko|jujubachyekoko]] || [[word:shushubachyekoko|shushubachyekoko]] || [[word:kukubachyekoko|kukubachyekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubachyekoko|thubachyekoko]] || [[word:jubachyekoko|jubachyekoko]] || [[word:shubachyekoko|shubachyekoko]] || [[word:kubachyekoko|kubachyekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobachyekoko|thobachyekoko]] || [[word:jobachyekoko|jobachyekoko]] || [[word:shobachyekoko|shobachyekoko]] || [[word:kobachyekoko|kobachyekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobachyekoko|thobachyekoko]] || [[word:jobachyekoko|jobachyekoko]] || [[word:shobachyekoko|shobachyekoko]] || [[word:kobachyekoko|kobachyekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbachyekoko|thﾃｦbachyekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbachyekoko|jﾃｦbachyekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbachyekoko|shﾃｦbachyekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbachyekoko|kﾃｦbachyekoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabachyekoko|thabachyekoko]] || [[word:jabachyekoko|jabachyekoko]] || [[word:shabachyekoko|shabachyekoko]] || [[word:kabachyekoko|kabachyekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
